title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, allowed in OS settings, new UI
scenario: User denies notifications during onboarding, then enables them via OS settings, and the app UI should update to reflect the new notification state with all settings unlocked and toggled ON.
steps: 1. Launch the app and begin the onboarding flow.
2. When prompted for notification permission, tap "Don't Allow".
4. Navigate to the device's OS Settings.
5. Find the app in the settings list and enable notifications.
7. Observe the app's UI for notification-related settings.
expected: The app should update its UI to reflect the new notification state, with all notification settings unlocked and toggled ON, allowing the user to modify them.
